reviews.comment:
Aca al paso con un buen servicio de comidas. No así los baños. La atención de los playeros es lenta aunque atenta.

(Translated by Google)
A quick stop with good food service. The restrooms, however, are not. The service from the beach attendants is slow but attentive.

reviews.comment:
2 de la tarde y nada para comer. Primer estacion despues de 300 km.  Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
2 p.m. and nothing to eat. First stop after 300 km. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROE5yNkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden mal, media hora para despachar combustible x cambio de turno.... El hotel habilita de mala gana la pileta a partir de las 17... Un desastre....

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, it takes half an hour to get fuel due to a shift change... The hotel reluctantly opens the pool after 5 PM... A disaster...

reviews.comment:
Ideal como posta camino al sur. Habitaciones limpias y muy buena atención. El restaurant bastante caro y no tan rico.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal as a stopover on the way south. Clean rooms and very good service. The restaurant is quite expensive and not very good.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Podrian mejorar la limpieza de los sanitarios deapues los precios son iguales a los de todos los full de todoel pais. Muy buena atencion y predisposición enla playa

(Translated by Google)
They could improve the cleanliness of the restrooms, as the prices are the same as all the other full-service resorts in the country. Very good service and helpfulness on the beach.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, cuenta con míni mercado, tiene lugar de esparcimiento natural con vista al río... Hay restaurantes, hoteles y parrilla a pocos metros, cuenta con seguridad policial y tiene buen acceso al predio

(Translated by Google)
Good service, it has a mini-market, a natural recreation area with a river view... There are restaurants, hotels and a grill a few meters away, it has police security and good access to the property
